summary: This document outlines an 18-month project plan divided into six work packages covering clinical research, EHR integration, AI development, and compliance. It details specific milestones, dependencies, and deliverables for each phase, including ethics approval and pilot implementation. The plan serves as an operational roadmap for the startup's product development and NHS integration strategy.
